caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or conducting an interview. He is wearing a green t-shirt with bold text and a cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. In the first image, the man is holding a smartphone, possibly reading from it or showing something on the screen. In the second image, he is gesturing with his hand, indicating that he is actively engaged in conversation or explaining a point. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
